## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on project access and technical details for Nicolas Castellanos' onboarding to the Sentinel One team.](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GitHub access for Nicolas pending; John to expedite request](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Project tech stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, vanilla React, hosted on Vercel](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [ContentStack branch creation approved for Nicolas' new content types](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Algolia integration planned for CVE database with separate index](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

## Topics

### Access Management

  - [John experiencing Slack login issues (SSL loop problem)](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [GitHub access for Nicolas and Marcus pending](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
      - [John to submit/expedite Nicolas' request](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [Marcus' access part of IT cycle, expected Monday](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [ContentStack access already granted to Nicolas](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Algolia access not required; John to set up separate index](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

### Project Technical Stack

  - [Frontend: Next.js with TypeScript](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Styling: Tailwind CSS (no component libraries like Shadcn)](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [State Management: Vanilla React (no additional libraries)](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Hosting: Vercel platform](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

### ContentStack Workflow

  - [Nicolas created testing environment in ContentStack](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Approval given to create new branch for content types](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Option to add new content types to main branch if non-disruptive](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Automation exists to populate Algolia index from ContentStack](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

### Algolia Integration

  - [Separate index to be set up for CVE database](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [No direct login needed for Nicolas](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Automation to be configured for populating index from ContentStack](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Existing API connection can be leveraged](https://fathom.video/share/ndJCX4eAcBo3tWSMyRers6syJ_2hkG5y?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
